headline: Zacks Value Trader Highlights: EOG Resources, Diamondback Energy and Magnolia Oil & Gas
summary: EOG Resources and peers gain traction as oil tops $90, lifting earnings outlooks and reviving interest in North American producers.

headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Alaska Airlines, ConocoPhillips, Commvault Systems, CoreWeave, Diamondback Energy, JFrog Ltd, Microsoft, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: After a volatile start to the week, futures are trading flat on Tuesday. Markets had plummeted early Monday before the opening bell, only to stage a massive turnaround following news of a potential diplomatic breakthrough. The rally was ignited by President Trump’s announcement of significant progress in negotiations with Iran, alongside a ...
